zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fauntleroy Esq於1416年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希時，他的父親John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh46歲，母親Joan LeWalleys41歲。他和Baroness Elizabeth Wadham至少有5個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1485年在英國英格蘭多瑟特享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fauntleroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French phrase enfant le roi ‘son of the king’, denoting a royal prince and, as a surname, a member of a royal prince's household.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Fauntleroy Esq was born in 1416, in Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh, was 46 and his mother, Joan LeWalleys, was 41. He had at least 5 sons and 5 daughters with Baroness Elizabeth Wadham. He died in 1485, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fauntleroy Esq est né en 1416, à Marsh, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Joan LeWalleys, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles avec Baroness Elizabeth Wadham. Il est décédé en 1485, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fauntleroy Esq 1416 in Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh 46 und seine Mutter Joan LeWalleys 41. Er hatte mit Baroness Elizabeth Wadham mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1485 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fauntleroy Esq è nato il nel 1416 nel Marsh, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Joan LeWalleys, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie con Baroness Elizabeth Wadham. Morì nel 1485, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fauntleroy Esqが1416年にイギリスイギリスドールセトマーッシュで生まれた時，父John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marshは46歳，母Joan LeWalleysは41歳であった。彼はBaroness Elizabeth Wadhamとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1485年にイギリスイギリスドールセトで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fauntleroy Esq(이)가 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan LeWalleys(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Baroness Elizabeth Wadham(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fauntleroy Esq родился в 1416 г. в местности марш, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan LeWalleys, 41. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Baroness Elizabeth Wadham. Он умер в 1485 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.
